title: Axebot
move_pattern: Normally starts in a random cycle: randomly selects between The One-Two (weight 2), Sharpen (cannot repeat consecutively), and Hammer Uppercut (weight 2), returning to random selection after each move. When spawned mid-combat (respawn scenario), starts with Boot Up first, then joins the same random cycle.
notes: Axebot enters combat with 2 stacks of Stock power, suggesting it can die and respawn during the encounter. Boot Up is only used when the Axebot is summoned mid-combat (e.g., upon respawn via its stock), at which point it gains 10 Block and 1 Strength before joining the normal random move rotation.
